Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # role memberships for backend developers will be created
  + four google_project_iam_member resources for project "deepsearch-dev"

  # direct role memberships for alice will be destroyed
  - three google_project_iam_member resources for project "deepsearch-dev"

  # google_artifact_registry_repository.deepsearch_dev_repository must be replaced
-/+ resource "google_artifact_registry_repository" "deepsearch_dev_repository" {
      ~ repository_id = "deepsearch-backend-repository" -> "deepsearch-backend-repository2"
    }

  # google_dns_record_set.dns_record will be updated in-place
  ~ resource "google_dns_record_set" "dns_record" {
      ~ ttl = 300 -> 400
    }

Changes to Outputs:
  ~ artifact_registry_repository = "deepsearch-backend-repository" -> "deepsearch-backend-repository2-adasd"

Plan: 5 to add, 1 to change, 4 to destroy.
